author: caconman424
image_descriptions: DC Sports catback exhaust product photo
Ark N2 Dual Catback product photo (visible)
ARK DT-S V2 burned tipped exhaust photo (visible)
content:
Alright guys,
It has come to my attention that our current definitive exhaust sticky and our exhaust sound clip sticky (both now deleted) are very outdated, so i believe it is in order to start a new one worth some merit.

This thread is going to be a group effort with all the members of the site to post up their exhaust system and their thoughts of it. Im going to try and compose this thread similar to the v6 headers sticky. What I need:

ONE picture of your exhaust (I dont care if it is generic or just of the rear of the car. I need at least one)
Brand:
Price:
Pipe & Tailpipe Diameter:
Quality of build:
Quality of Sound:
Sound Loudness:
Other notes:

Also, at least one sound clip video for each brand of exhaust would greatly be appreciated. Thank you.

I encourage you all to look up these exhausts on youtube, as there are many different videos, but I will on post one for each to keep this post somewhat short

The scales will be on 1-10 basis, 1 being the worst/loudest and 10 being the best/most quiet (ex. 10 = stock loudness, where as 1 = hotrod loud) Multiple posts of the same exhaust system, I will add up and take the average from, for best accuracy. Then I will combine all posts into this OP for easy finding.

Custom Exhaust Section has been added at end of post

---

Ill start:
Brand: DC Sports Exhaust
[IMAGE: DC Sports catback product photo]
[YouTube: 03 Tiburon GT v6: DC sports Exhaust...]

---

Borla:
Price: $600-$700
Pipe Diameter: 2.25"
Quality of build: 9
Quality of Sound: 10
Sound Loudness: 8
Other notes: If not for smaller piping size, this would be the best all around exhaust for the Tib IMO
[IMAGE: Borla exhaust photo (broken)]

---

Aeon imports:
Price: $250
Pipe diameter: 2.25 or 2.5
Quality of build: 3
Quality of Sound: 9
Sound Loudness: 6
Other notes: poor quality metal, never really perfect fitment
[IMAGE: Aeon imports photo (broken)]
[YouTube: video unavailable]

---

Greddy Evo 2:
Price: $900
Pipe Diameter: 2.5"
Quality of build: 8
Quality of Sound: 4 — very raspy
Sound Loudness: 3 — very loud
Other notes: decent quality, good pipe size, sounds like crap IMO
[IMAGE: Greddy Evo 2 exhaust photo]
[YouTube: 06 Hyundai Tiburon With Greddy Evo 2 Exhaust]

---

SFR single:
Price: $900 when it was in production
Pipe Diameter: 3"
Quality of build: 10
Quality of Sound: 6
Sound Loudness: 7
Other notes: Best for HP gains with FI, excellent build quality
[IMAGE: SFR single catback photo (broken)]

---

Ark N2 Dual Catback:
Price:
Pipe Diameter:
Quality of build:
Quality of sound:
Sound Loudness:
Other notes:
[IMAGE: Ark N2 product photo (visible, shows dual outlet catback)]

---

Brand: ARK DT-S V2 (Burned Tipped)
Price: Regular $1379, Forum Discount ~$800 (July 4th discount)
Pipe & Tailpipe Diameter: 4.5" Diameter tailpipe, 2.5" pipe, No Silencer
Quality of build: 10
Quality of Sound: 10
Sound Loudness: 6
[NOTE: Additional entries continue in OP — page 1 only scraped]
extraction_notes: Full OP captured after 'See more' clicked. Sound scale: 1=worst/hotrod loud, 10=best/stock quiet. Multiple exhaust brands with community-averaged scores.
